description: Product Description If You're Reading This Bring Me A Beer Apron What? It’s a barbecue, somebody bring the man a cold one! He’s been slaving away over a hot grill just to feed everyone a keep a smile on their faces. But he was strategic, he knows that out of everyone who reads the apron and gets a good laugh, he’s bound to have some percentage of return. So if the man has a spatula in one hand and the other one is empty—-you know what you have to do. Funny High Quality Apron Great Protection for your Love The high-quality thick 100% cotton protects clothes from splashing oil and allows our aprons to be used for years to come. Our screen printing process ensures that it will not fade, chip, or peel when washed. The apron has adjustable 40" long waist ties and neckties, one size fits most people. Two useful pockets make it easy to store tongs, meat thermometers, etc. Notes Machine washable and tumble dry low. Do not bleach, Wash dark colors separately. Please allow 1-2cm error due to manual measurement. Description Apron Category: Sleeveless Apron Material: 100% Cotton Color: Solid color(Black) Sizes: 30.4*27in Brand:APRONPANDA I'll Feed All You F**kers Your Opinion Wasn't In The Recipe I Like My Butt Rubbed and My Pork Pulled The Grill Fahter Mr. Good Lookin Is Cookin Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 707 4.6 out of 5 stars 528 4.8 out of 5 stars 98 4.6 out of 5 stars 481 4.6 out of 5 stars 504 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 — no data £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £7.64 £ 7 . 64 Material 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton 100% Cotton Gift packing ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Adjustable Neck Strap ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Who's APRONPANDA People When 2020 hit and I was forced to not only change careers but to become creative with my "quarantined cooking", I decided to find something to at least make me feel good while doing it. I partnered with an animal protection organization - APRONPANDA was created! To those who love cooking, grilling, baking (or eating) as much as I do, I hope you smile while you perform culinary masterpieces in the kitchen and beyond! A great gift blesses both the giver and the receiver. Aprons are our way of filling the world with a little more joy, happiness and generosity.
